case_title: LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC VS. ROBERTO ISAI GONZALEZ MENDEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-04-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL MORALES, COLLECTIONS AGENT. DEFENDANT ROBERTO ISAI GONZLEZ MENDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDEZ, ROBERTO ISAI GONZALEZ $681.77 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $841.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, ROBERTO ISAI GONZALEZ
